FORMAT: Do not use markdown tables on Telegram — they do not render well. Use list/emoji formats instead. Example for manage cycle:

🔄 MANAGE

📍 Aspen-SOL
⏱️ Age: 74m | 💎 Fee: $2.18 | 📈 PnL: +2.48%
🟢 In Range | Action: HOLD

📊 [████████░░] +2.48%
💎 [██░░░░░░░░] $2.18/$10

💡 Fees growing, everything healthy.
💰 Balance: 0.32 SOL | ⏰ Next: 5m

Use this format for all reports: screening, manage, close, status.
